meaning: n.(常作Mrs.Grundy)(原为十八世纪英国剧中的人物)[喻]过分重规矩的人,拘泥礼节的人
examples: Grundy lost his job in the fallout from the incident.
Bernstein lost the case, but never held it against Grundy.
This is the end Of Solomon Grundy.
The notable casualty is her renowned wit, which fails to penetrate Ms Grundy's scholarship.
Burnside was on campus during a January 2002 shooting at Appalachian School of Law in Grundy, Virginia.
